name: Pomberito
short_description: Survive 5 nights in the heart of northeastern Argentina as a local farmer and reveal the truth behind the haunting tales of the Pombero in a world where folklore meets terror.
detailed_description:
"Pomberito" is a first-person horror adventure game set in the folklore-rich landscapes of South America. The game unfolds over five micro-episodes, each representing a night from Monday to Friday. Taking place in the rural countryside of a northeastern province of Argentina, players step into the shoes of a local character tasked with completing daily chores in a farm.



As the protagonist navigates through the isolated environment, you will encounter elements inspired by South American folklore, adding a unique and cultural twist to the horror genre. The game's suspenseful ambiance intensifies as each night progresses, with unexpected twists and encounters awaiting the player.



One of the standout features of "Pomberito" is its multiple endings, allowing players to explore different outcomes based on their decisions and actions throughout the week. Players will strive to uncover the mysteries surrounding the folklore-inspired horrors in the rural landscapes of Argentina.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America
